calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearances, the tentative ruling on Plaintiff Ema Bell's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is adopted as follows:

Plaintiff's Motion to Approve the Proposition 65 Settlement and Consent Judgment is granted as unopposed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. Not Reported. (302/RCE)
